## Security Patch Details

### Vulnerability Information

- **CVE ID:** 
- **Severity:** [ ] Critical [ ] High [ ] Moderate [ ] Low
- **Affected Package:** 
- **Vulnerable Versions:** 
- **Patched Version:** 

### Description

```
[Describe the vulnerability and its impact]
```

### Remediation

- [ ] Update package to patched version
- [ ] Apply workaround (if no patch available)
- [ ] Document accepted risk (if no patch available)

### Testing

- [ ] Run `npm run test:ci`
- [ ] Run `npm run security:check`
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] No breaking changes detected

### Checklist

- [ ] Vulnerability confirmed
- [ ] Patch applied or workaround implemented
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Ready for merge
